title: Stainless Steel Milk/Tea pan Egg/Water Boiling Pot with 2 Pouring Lips Induction hob Soup Warming Sauce pan 16cm
features: PREMIUM MATERIAL - Pro Quality Stainless Steel milk saucepan is Designed and Built to last lifetime. Rust-free and non-toxic. No need to worry about reacting with food or altering natural flavours.

ERGONOMIC HANDLE - With a Sturdy, stainless silicone Handle for heavy-duty performance, our Milk pans are made to withstand the Demands of a busy home kitchen. Long handle is firmly riveted providing secure, solid and comfortable grip. It stays nice and cool, so you can hold and carry the pan without feeling the heat.

BASE- Thick base delivers superior heat conduction and even heat distribution, giving you greater control over the temperature level, providing consistent cooking results. Dual lip design gives mess-free pouring, whether you're right or left handed.

PROFESSIONAL COOKING- Includes an internal measuring scale and double pouring lips for effortless cooking. Compatible with all hobs including induction. High grade polish makes for easy cleaning and it is dishwasher safe. Not Oven Safe.
MULTI-PURPOSE- Perfect size for small portions: cooking vegetables, warming milk, coffee, melting butter, boiling eggs, simmering sauces or soups, or simply reheating leftovers.
description: Royal Cuisine Induction-Safe Milk Pan A sturdy everyday milk pan, perfect for one-person portions and little cooking jobs When it comes to cooking and food prep, it’s all about convenience. You want minimal mess, and quick results. With this high-quality milk pan from Royal Cuisine, you can make light work of those fiddly little jobs, like boiling milk for a frothy latte or heating soup for a quick snack. This small saucepan is made of high-quality stainless steel. Base helps to distribute heat quickly and evenly, and ensures a quick response to any temperature changes (it’ll go from fast boil to steady simmer in a snap). It also means you can use it with any hob, including induction stoves. Keep it in your cupboard and you’ll never be caught short when making scrambled eggs or making quick one-person meals. Mirror polished stainless steel means it will never easily scratch, break, rust or corrode. You can also use it to boil small portions of pasta and veg or make home-made sauces, gravy or custard. The milk pan has a long riveted handle to provide extra strength as they are permanently attached and you will not have worry about it becoming loose or having to be tightened. The end of the handle also has a hanging hole. Ceramic, Electric, Gas, Halogen, Induction safe. - Dishwasher Safe - PFOA and PTFE.
